testcase.name: validateProductSelection
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //android.widget.TextView[@text='PRODUCTS'], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: An element could not be located on the page using the given search parameters..
